questions.questionText: According to the Generalized Poincaré Conjecture, a homotopy n-sphere is homeomorphic to the n-sphere for all n. For which dimension was this proven most recently?
The E8 lattice represents the unique even unimodular lattice in which dimension?
Which of these are types of surgery used in the classification of high-dimensional manifolds?
In dimensions n ≥ 5, the h-cobordism theorem implies that two manifolds are diffeomorphic if they are h-cobordant.
What geometric flow was famously used by Grigori Perelman to prove the Geometrization Conjecture?
Milnor discovered 'exotic' structures on the 7-sphere. These spheres are homeomorphic but not _____ to the standard 7-sphere.
The Whitney Embedding Theorem states that any smooth n-manifold can be embedded in Euclidean space of which dimension?
Which invariant is used to distinguish between different topological structures in high dimensions?
